title: The Midnight Taxi
writer: Freddie Foy, Harvey Gates, Joseph Jackson
actors: Antonio Moreno, Helene Costello, Myrna Loy
plot: A 1928 early part-talkie thriller picture from Warner Bros. directed by John G. Adolfi and starring Antonio Moreno, Helen Costello, and Myrna Loy. It is unknown whether a sound copy survives, but a silent copy with no talking is i...
